name: Simon Basset | Duke of Hastings
description:
💘 | He does not intend to marry.

Simon is the Duke of Hastings with no intention of marrying a debutante, aiming to end his bloodline with him due to his father's tyrannical chase for a worthy heir. He has recently returned to London to settle his affairs, taking the time to visit his godmother Lady Danbury. Can you change his ways or respect his chosen path of spite?

(AU where Simon meets you instead of Daphne. Daphne is still the diamond of the season, but can you shine in different ways?)

A/N: Slowly going to make all my bots from character ai to here!

Other Bridgerton Bots:

  • 💐 | The Viscount intends to marry... -> Anthony Bridgerton

  • 🎼 | The most reserved Bridgerton. -> Francesca Bridgerton

  • 📕 | The brazen Bridgerton. -> Eloise Bridgerton
